title: Observation Envelope
description: Common envelope for every execution-reality observation. Enforces the Founder-mandated provenance and confidence fields. Structural invariants only — no empirical values are asserted here.

schema_version.description: SemVer of the schema this record was written against.

observation_id.description: Globally unique id for this observation (uniqueness is a validation rule; see SPEC-05).

event_timestamp.description: Time the event occurred at the source/exchange, RFC3339 with timezone. Must be within a valid session window (SPEC-05 R-TS-*).

ingest_timestamp.description: Time this observation was captured by the collector. ingest_timestamp >= event_timestamp within clock-skew tolerance (SPEC-05 R-TS-3).

isin.description: ISIN if known; sourced from exchange contract master, never inferred.

lot_size.description: Contract/lot size from exchange master. null = UNKNOWN until sourced.

tick_size.description: Minimum price increment from exchange master. null = UNKNOWN until sourced; never assumed.

venue.description: Execution/quote venue. Extend enum only from verified venue list.

data_provenance.description: Where this observation came from and how it was captured. Mandatory per Founder directive.

capture_host.description: Host that captured the record (e.g. the Windows workstation id).

clock_source.description: Basis of the capture clock; drives clock-skew tolerance.

clock_offset_ms.description: Measured offset vs reference clock if known; null = UNKNOWN.

replay_of.description: If this is a replay, the id/batch of the original capture.

confidence.description: Evidence quality of this record. UNKNOWN is a first-class value and must never be silently upgraded.

level.description: measured = direct observation; derived = computed only from measured inputs; modeled = involves an explicit model/assumption (must name it); unknown = insufficient evidence.

interval.description: Confidence interval for a derived quantity. Present only when computed from real samples; never fabricated.

market_conditions.description: Snapshot of market state at event time. All fields optional and nullable — absent evidence stays absent, it is not defaulted.

volatility_proxy.description: e.g. rolling realized vol; label its definition in provenance.
